Table and Chair Rentals in Liverpool NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater and serves Liverpool NS — a historic South Shore town at the mouth of the Mersey River, once a privateering hub — with table and chair rentals, inflatables, water slides, games, and party packages. South Shore communities enjoy active summer seasons with beach events, community fairs, and backyard celebrations that are a perfect fit for our inflatable and party rental lineup.

Travel from Bridgewater to Liverpool NS is approximately 55 km. The first 15 km is free; travel beyond that is quoted at $0.72/km (estimate ~$29 one way, confirmed before booking). Availability, setup suitability, staffing requirements, and deposit details are all confirmed before your booking is finalized.

Best For

  • Birthday parties
  • Community events
  • School and church events
  • Outdoor gatherings

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you rent tables and chairs for events in Liverpool NS?
Table and chair rentals can be delivered to Liverpool NS by availability and travel quote from Bridgewater, approximately 55 km away. Travel beyond the first 15 km is quoted at $0.72/km. Availability and final pricing are confirmed manually — we do not auto-confirm availability online.
How many chairs do you have available?
We currently have 15 black padded chairs in stock. White folding chairs are available by request from $3 each, and 6ft tables are available by request from $8 each. Quantities and availability are confirmed when you contact us.
What is the pricing for table and chair rentals?
Black padded chairs are $3 each (15 in stock). White folding chairs are available from $3 each by request. 6ft tables are available from $8 each by request. All pricing and availability are confirmed manually before booking.
Can I rent tables and chairs without renting an inflatable?
Tables and chairs are primarily offered as add-ons to inflatable rentals, foam parties, 360 Photo Booth bookings, and party packages. Standalone table and chair rentals may be available by quote — contact us to discuss your needs.
How far in advance should I book tables and chairs?
We recommend contacting us as early as possible, especially for summer and weekend dates. Availability is not guaranteed until confirmed by us and a deposit is received. Do not assume availability based on online forms alone.
